# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: IAM Role for Cross-Account Access for CI/CD System

Resources:
  CrossAccountCI_CDRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: CrossAccountCI_CDRole
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: 
                - "ec2.amazonaws.com"
                - "lambda.amazonaws.com"
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                aws:SourceAccount: 
                  - "arn:aws:iam::*:role/*" # Wildcard for flexibility
            # Allowing multiple accounts in the organization
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: 
                - "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:root" # Replace with actual account IDs
                - "arn:aws:iam::234567890123:root" # Replace with actual account IDs
                - "arn:aws:iam::*:*" # Wildcard for future accounts
            Action: sts:AssumeRole

      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CI_CDLeastPrivilegePolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "s3:ListBucket"
                  - "s3:GetObject"
                  - "codebuild:StartBuild"
                  - "codepipeline:StartPipelineExecution"
                Resource: 
                  - "arn:aws:s3:::your-bucket-name" # Replace with actual bucket ARN
                  - "arn:aws:codebuild:your-region:your-account-id:project/your-project-name" # Replace with actual project ARN
                  - "arn:aws:codepipeline:your-region:your-account-id:your-pipeline-name" # Replace with actual pipeline ARN

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: "ARN of the Cross Account CI/CD Role"
    Value: !GetAtt CrossAccountCI_CDRole.Arn
